SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.coff

Class CoffSection

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.coff.CoffSection
All Implemented Interfaces:
StreamWritable, Writable
Direct Known Subclasses:
CoffBytes, CoffUninitialized
public abstract class CoffSection extends Object implements Writable
Base class for COFF sections.

    Field
    Description
    protected CoffRelocationTable
    relocationTable
    Relocation table associated with this section.

  • Field Details

    • relocationTable

      protected CoffRelocationTable relocationTable
      Relocation table associated with this section.

  • Constructor Details

    • CoffSection

      public CoffSection(CoffFile coff, String name, int virtualSize, int physicalAddress, int virtualAddress, int pointerToRawData, CoffSectionFlags characteristics)
      Creates a COFF section.
      Parameters:
      coff - parent COFF file
      name - section name
      virtualSize - section virtual size
      physicalAddress - section physical address
      virtualAddress - section virtual address
      pointerToRawData - file offset of section data
      characteristics - section characteristics flags

  • Method Details

    • getCoffFile

      public CoffFile getCoffFile()
      Returns the COFF file this section belongs to.
      Returns:
      the parent COFF file

      public String getName()
      Returns the section name.
      Returns:
      the section name

      Returns the virtual size of this section.

      Returns the physical address of this section.

    • getOffset

      public long getOffset()
      Description copied from interface: Writable
      Returns the file offset where this object should be written.
      Specified by:
      getOffset in interface Writable
      Returns:
      the file offset in bytes

    • setOffset

      public void setOffset(int pointerToRawData)
      Sets the file offset for this section's raw data.
      Parameters:
      pointerToRawData - new file offset
